summary_en: 17.0M shares (1.90% of outstanding), ¥69.0B upper limit, acquisition window June 2 – November 18, 2026. Comprises ¥35.4B base return (50% of adjusted consolidated profit, 3-year average) and ¥33.6B supplementary return (50% of net gains from policy stock disposals after tax), financed within capital-level adjustment framework alongside dividend.
title_en: Notice Regarding Decision on Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief:
Sompo Holdings announced on 20 May 2026 that its Board of Directors resolved to acquire up to 17.0 million treasury shares (1.90% of outstanding) for an aggregate consideration not to exceed ¥69.0 billion during the period from 2 June to 18 November 2026.

The buyback is framed as part of the company's capital-allocation policy: a base return of ¥35.4 billion (representing 50% of three-year average adjusted consolidated profit) plus a supplementary return of ¥33.6 billion (50% of after-tax gains on policy stock disposals). Treasury acquisition is presented alongside dividend as a capital-level adjustment tool, subject to broader risk and capital conditions, business performance, and financial market environment.

As of 30 April 2026, Sompo held 40.4 million treasury shares against an issued share count (excluding treasury) of 893.8 million shares. The acquisition method is not explicitly specified in the excerpt but follows statutory authorization under Company Law Article 165(3).
